textByHashes.9cdce6830e18e0ced82e4b17a935b50c8972598d: Keep your voice down! You've no idea who might be listening!
textByHashes.f06bc3a42f9084fa45214e58e2ef04b35f60b471: No I don't! I keep my distance from that lot!
textByHashes.bf1781db57051ea9c3a469df2065281394f08106: However, word on the streets is that Robert O'Reilly has been working with them. Perhaps he could help you. He lives in the middle of town.
textByHashes.bf0ff82e9c7cfdddc31a23c1682f48eb7f619725: He'll probably be at his home. You'll find it in the middle of town.
